RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK's MOTION TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT - The Court grants Plaintiff Capital One Bank's unopposed motion to set aside default and vacate default judgment and dismiss action without prejudice.
